ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the organization */,
  "player_birthdate" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "player_rank" TEXT /* Player's current rank in the organization */,
  "player_social_media" TEXT /* Player's social media handle or profile URL */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Player's biography or background information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach managing the team */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the team is based */,
  "team_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Team's social media handle or profile URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "coach_birthdate" TEXT /* Coach's date of birth */,
  "coach_nationality" TEXT /* Coach's nationality */,
  "coach_bio" TEXT /* Coach's biography or background information */,
  "coach_social_media" TEXT /* Coach's social media handle or profile URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game (e.g., FPS, MOBA) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "game_publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "game_developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "game_platforms" TEXT /* Platforms on which the game is available */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "winner_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the match */,
  "match_venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was held */,
  "match_spectator_count" INTEGER /* Number of spectators for the match */,
  "match_prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match associated with the statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the statistics */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills made by the player in the match */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths experienced by the player */,
  "adr" REAL /* Average damage per round dealt by the player */,
  "kast" REAL /* Kill-to-death ratio of the player */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the player's performance in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "headshots" INTEGER /* Number of headshots made by the player */,
  "damage_taken" REAL /* Total damage taken by the player */,
  "heals" INTEGER /* Number of heals performed by the player */,
  "utility_used" INTEGER /* Number of utility items used by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., sniper, support) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player assumed the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the player's role */,
  "role_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the role change, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "tournament_prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  "tournament_spectator_count" INTEGER /* Number of spectators for the tournament */,
  "tournament_website" TEXT /* URL of the tournament's official website */,
  "tournament_social_media" TEXT /* Tournament's social media handle or profile URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_tournaments" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player accessing the stats or match data */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
